bereavement: Bereavement Fare: a reduced fare for travel related to the recent death of an immediate family member (spouse, parent, child, sibling, grandparent). Proof of relationship and documentation (death certificate, obituary, or a hospital/hospice letter) are required. Applications MUST be submitted BEFORE the departure of the first flight. Retroactive applications after travel has started are not accepted. Benefit: up to 35% off the lowest published fare in the same booking class. Apply through the website booking flow or by calling +1-555-SKY-HELP; decisions are returned within 4 hours.
